sections.a_eyebrow: Interactive · Heavy Motion · Advanced JS · Engaging · Experimental
sections.a_description: Custom cursor trails, magnetic hover effects, and interaction ripples that follow the mouse across the page — Cursor Mouse Effects design transforms the pointer itself into a design element. The dark backgrounds serve as canvases where lime-green particle trails, glow effects, and cursor transformations are most visible, creating an experience where simply moving the mouse becomes an act of visual creation.

This cursor-driven style powers creative agency homepages, interactive art installations, experimental design portfolios, and playful brand microsites. You'll see it on award-chasing agency sites where custom cursors morph into text on hover, portfolio galleries where the cursor leaves particle trails, and interactive experiences where magnetic effects pull the cursor toward clickable elements.

a_image_cover.alt: Cursor Mouse Effects style use case illustration
Cursor Mouse Effects style use case illustration
Cursor Mouse Effects style use case illustration

sections.a_description: The playful, interaction-obsessed aesthetic of cursor-effect websites — custom cursors that trail particles, morph on hover, and create visual ripples across the page. Background: dark charcoal (#111111) serving as a dark canvas where cursor trails and glow effects are most visible. The .inner panel has a subtle dark background (rgba(255,255,255,0.05)) with a 1px border (rgba(255,255,255,0.1)) and 12px border-radius — UI that reacts to cursor proximity. Colors: lime green (#84cc16) as the primary accent — energetic, youthful, and eye-catching for cursor trail particles and interaction highlights. Off-white (#f5f5f5) for headings, medium gray (#a3a3a3) for body text. The aesthetic is experimental and playful — the cursor itself becomes a design element, leaving trails, creating magnetic effects, and transforming based on what it hovers over. Set in Urbanist — a geometric sans-serif with modern proportions and a slightly playful character. Heading at weight 600, 26px, line-height 1.3, letter-spacing -0.3px, color #f5f5f5. Eyebrow at weight 500, 11px, uppercase, 2px letter-spacing, color #84cc16. Body at weight 400, 14px, line-height 1.7, color #a3a3a3. Buttons: primary — lime (#84cc16), dark text (#111111), 8px border-radius. Secondary: transparent, lime border. Alternatives: General Sans (modern geometric), Switzer (clean contemporary).
